articles.title: Big Pharma Brain Scam: Vitamin E Crushes Alzheimer's While Industry Pushes Toxic Drugs
articles.summary: Natural News exposes how a cheap, readily available vitamin E supplement provides real brain protection against Alzheimer's while pharmaceutical giants peddle expensive, dangerous drugs that barely manage symptoms. The medical establishment systematically ignores this safe, effective alternative to protect their billion-dollar dementia drug market.

articles.title: CIA's 50-Year Cover-Up: Hidden Research on Ivermectin and Cancer Treatments Finally Exposed
articles.summary: A bombshell report reveals the CIA deliberately concealed decades of research on repurposed drugs like ivermectin for cancer treatment. For half a century, the intelligence agency buried potentially life-saving therapeutic data to protect pharmaceutical interests and maintain control over medical narratives.

articles.title: FDA Drug Label Fraud: Why They Hide Acetaminophen's Superior Safety Profile
articles.summary: Despite acetaminophen being safer than ibuprofen for most patients, the FDA's liability fears and per-drug labeling mandate prevent comparative safety information from reaching consumers. This regulatory cowardice leaves patients in the dark about which painkiller actually poses less risk to their stomach, heart, and kidneys.

articles.title: Academic Fraud Exposed: Rice Scientist Gets 15-Year Ban After 17-Year Cover-Up
articles.summary: The Office of Research Integrity finally acts on chemist Ariel Fernández's data fabrication at Rice University, but only after letting him operate freely for nearly two decades. This glacial enforcement pace shows how academic institutions and federal oversight protect fraudulent researchers at the expense of scientific integrity.

articles.title: WHO's Vaccine Tyranny: Building Global Drug Approval Machine With Gates Money
articles.summary: The World Health Organization is constructing a supranational vaccine authorization system with direct financial backing from Bill Gates, creating unprecedented conflicts of interest. This power grab would bypass national sovereignty over drug approvals, putting global vaccine policy in the hands of unelected technocrats with pharmaceutical industry ties.

articles.title: Neuralink Nightmare: Employee Mauled by Virus-Infected Monkeys in Musk's Brain Experiments
articles.summary: A former Neuralink worker claims she was brutally attacked by monkeys carrying dangerous viruses during Elon Musk's brain implant trials, raising serious questions about laboratory safety protocols. The lawsuit exposes how tech billionaires can operate human experimentation programs with minimal oversight while putting workers at risk.

articles.title: COVID Vaccine Cover-Up Confirmed: Biden Admin Ignored Safety Signals and Suppressed Injury Data
articles.summary: Senator Ron Johnson's explosive report proves Biden administration health officials deliberately ignored VAERS safety signals and actively suppressed COVID vaccine side effect data. The systematic cover-up of adverse events demonstrates how federal health agencies prioritized political narratives over public safety.

articles.title: Immune System Breakthrough Buried: How 'Feed a Cold' Actually Supercharges Disease-Fighting Cells
articles.summary: New research proves eating truly does boost immune system T cells that target infection and disease, validating ancient wisdom while revealing potential applications for cancer therapy optimization. This metabolic approach to immune function gets buried while pharmaceutical companies push expensive immunomodulating drugs instead of simple nutritional strategies.
